summary: Comprehensive testing of NEW Project Gallery feature - All 9 features tested and working correctly (100% pass rate)
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent - proper use of React hooks (useState, useEffect, useCallback)
Keyboard event handling properly implemented with cleanup in useEffect
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Lightbox properly prevents body scroll when open
Category filtering logic is clean and efficient
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - existing 8 projects sufficient for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project Gallery feature fully tested. All features working: page loads at /projects with 8 projects, category filters (All/Industrial/Commercial/Institutional/Residential) work correctly, grid toggle (2/3 columns) works, lightbox opens with image/title/description/client/category, lightbox navigation (arrows + keyboard ArrowRight/ArrowLeft/Escape) works, category links at bottom navigate correctly, navbar PROJECTS dropdown includes 'All Projects' link.

project_gallery_page: ✓ Page loads at /projects with all 8 projects displayed
✓ Hero section shows '8 Total Projects' and '4 Categories'
category_filters: ✓ Count text updates correctly (e.g., 'Showing 3 projects in Commercial')
lightbox: ✓ Lightbox displays project title, description, client, category
keyboard_navigation: ✓ ArrowRight key navigates to next project
✓ ArrowLeft key navigates to previous project
